notableEvents.label: Tim Tawa grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Tim Tawa hits a grand slam (1) to left field. Jose Fernandez scores. Nolan Arenado scores. Alek Thomas scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Luis Campusano reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Jose Fernandez. Luis Campusano to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Luis Campusano reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Jose Fernandez. Luis Campusano to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: James McCann GIDP
notableEvents.detail: James McCann grounds into a double play, second baseman Jake Cronenworth to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Jorge Barrosa out at 2nd. James McCann out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: James McCann rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: James McCann grounds into a double play, second baseman Jake Cronenworth to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Jorge Barrosa out at 2nd. James McCann out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. picked off and caught stealing 3rd base, pitcher Ryan Thompson to second baseman Ildemaro Vargas to third baseman Nolan Arenado. Jackson Merrill to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Luis Campusano reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Luis Campusano reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Jose Fernandez. Luis Campusano to 2nd.
